home.empty: Your board is empty. Open Settings and drag a widget from the palette.

settings.title: Settings
settings.comingSoon: Full editing canvas, data source management and system settings will land starting in Phase 1.
settings.hint: Drag widgets from the palette onto the canvas. Click a widget to edit or delete it.
settings.shortcuts: Shortcuts: Ctrl/⌘+click multi-select · Shift range · Marquee · Ctrl/⌘+C/V copy/paste · Del remove · Esc clear · Ctrl/⌘+A select all
settings.boardNote: Site title and light/dark wallpaper are edited under System. Here you only change grid spacing.
settings.wallpaperUploadHint: Upload JPG / PNG / WebP (≤ 32 MiB per file). Use a URL for larger files.
settings.wallpaperBusy: Uploading… (large files may take a while)
settings.exportDesc: Download board, data sources, and widgets as one JSON bundle for backup.
settings.importWarn: Import replaces every widget and data source; export a backup first.
settings.importConfirm: Import wipes all widgets and data sources and rebuilds. Continue?
settings.wallpaperThemeRequiresImage: Wallpaper theme needs an uploaded image or URL.
settings.wallpaperTooLarge: Wallpaper must be ≤ {mb} MiB. Use an external URL for larger files.
settings.wallpaperUploadOk: Uploaded. Wallpaper URL filled in—click Save site and theme to apply.
settings.glassTintAutoHint: After saving, the app samples the wallpaper and softens that color for Aero-style glass.

cityPicker.placeholder: Type city or pinyin, e.g. Hangzhou or hz
cityPicker.hintMatch: Up to {limit} matches, grouped by letter
cityPicker.hintBrowse: Sorted by pinyin, showing up to {limit} rows · type to narrow
cityPicker.noMatch: No city matched. Try another keyword.
